title: Inventing ELIZA - How the First Chatbot Shaped the Future of AI
summary: 《Inventing ELIZA》一书探讨了首个聊天机器人ELIZA的发明及其对人工智能发展的影响，提供开放获取PDF及配套网站资源。
highlights: The book 'Inventing ELIZA - How the First Chatbot Shaped the Future of AI' is Open Access.
Related CoRecursive podcast episode on ELIZA with Jeff Shrager.
